query_normalized: predicting the yield strength of steel alloys from composition and heat treatment parameters materials science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (b) as it measures material properties including strength parameters on the same domain (steel alloys - specifically stainless steels), providing statistical characterization of the dependent variable (strength) even though it doesn't address the full prediction task from composition and heat treatment parameters.
